task_completion.description: Navigate to the Holidays configuration section in ServiceDesk Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ServiceDesk Plus interface showing the 'Holidays' setup or administration page.

task_completion.description: Create a new holiday list with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form field or list header displaying the exact name 'US Corporate Holidays 2025'.

task_completion.description: Add New Year's Day, Martin Luther King Jr. Day, and Presidents' Day with correct 2025 dates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: List entries showing 'New Year's Day' (Jan 1, 2025), 'Martin Luther King Jr. Day' (Jan 20, 2025), and 'Presidents' Day' (Feb 17, 2025).

task_completion.description: Add Memorial Day, Independence Day, and Labor Day with correct 2025 dates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: List entries showing 'Memorial Day' (May 26, 2025), 'Independence Day' (Jul 4, 2025), and 'Labor Day' (Sep 1, 2025).

task_completion.description: Add Thanksgiving Day and Christmas Day with correct 2025 dates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: List entries showing 'Thanksgiving Day' (Nov 27, 2025) and 'Christmas Day' (Dec 25, 2025).

task_completion.description: Save the newly created holiday list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'saved successfully') or the main holidays view showing the fully populated 'US Corporate Holidays 2025' list.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ServiceDesk Plus GUI rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser interface with the mouse cursor clicking or typing in the ServiceDesk Plus application.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual ServiceDesk Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of standard ServiceDesk Plus UI elements like the navigation bar, header, and settings menus, rather than a text editor or mock page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database client or terminal to insert the holidays directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database management tools (like psql or pgAdmin) are visible executing SQL INSERT commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected List Name: 'US Corporate Holidays 2025'. Expected Holidays and Dates: New Year's Day (2025-01-01), Martin Luther King Jr. Day (2025-01-20), Presidents' Day (2025-02-17), Memorial Day (2025-05-26), Independence Day (2025-07-04), Labor Day (2025-09-01), Thanksgiving Day (2025-11-27), Christmas Day (2025-12-25).
